experience.techStack: .NET 9, Razor Pages, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap 5, DevExtreme, SQL Server, GitHub
highlights: Participated in developing PMSH software for a 5-star hotel system in a real-world operational environment.
Contributed to migrating the system from WinForms to a web application by rebuilding screens and processing workflows on the web platform.
Improved user experience by reducing full-page reloads through the use of modals combined with partial views, making interactions smoother and more seamless.
Standardized DateTime formatting in API workflows, helping reduce validation errors caused by incorrect formats.
Contributed to helping the project pass two rounds of internal testing and become ready for the client testing phase.
